calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Mar-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Modify Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Mar-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Larsen for Roger Semenak, Jr.

The Court stated that there's not a lot of information in the petition, that it does not know what's left in the trust and what the fees are based on, and that it does not know anything about Mr. Semenak. Mr. Larsen stated that there was about $430,000.00 in the trust from January 1, 2019 to December 31, 2019, that there was a distribution to Mr. Semenak, that there were Trustee fees (2% to Union Bank), that there were taxes and that there was a loss of $2,000.00. Mr. Larsen also stated that a portion of Trustee fees will still occur, that Mr. Semenak is doing very well, that he is working, and that he is self-sufficient and independent. In addition, Mr. Larsen stated that Mr. Semenak has a 20-year old Daughter, and that she does live with him, but not to help him. The Court stated that it has to be mindful of the original purpose of the trust, that it's not for estate planning, and that if it makes the requested changes, it is essentially turning into an estate plan and it's terminating the trust. The Court also stated that it wants something showing what the trust has been over the last ten years, what the Trustee's fees are, information regarding Mr. Semenak's health circumstances and that it needs evidence showing that Mr. Semenak can manage these funds. Mr. Larsen requested three weeks. The Petition to Modify Irrevocable Trust is continued to March 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
